scenario:
INVITE sip:[field1]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port];transport=[transport] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: sip:[field0]@[local_ip];tag=[call_number] To: sip:[field1]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 1 INVITE Contact: <sip:[field0]@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]> Supported: 100rel, histinfo, join, replaces, sdp-anat, timer Session-Expires: 1200;refresher=uac Max-Forwards: 70 Min-SE: 1200 Subject: Performance Test User-to-User: 00FA080001001056965CFB;encoding=hex Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len]
v=0 o=- 1485338250 1 IN IP4 192.168.25.2 s=- c=IN IP4 192.168.25.3 b=TIAS:64000 t=0 0 a=avf:avc=n prio=n a=csup:avf-v0 m=audio 6192 RTP/AVP 0 8 127 a=sendrecv a=rtpmap:127 telephone-event/8000 a=ptime:20
PRACK sip:[field1]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port];transport=[transport] SIP/2.0 [last_Via:] From: sip:[field0]@[local_ip];tag=[call_number] To: sip:[field1]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port][peer_tag_param] [last_Call-ID:] RAck: 1 1 INVITE CSeq: 2 PRACK Contact: <sip:[field0]@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]> Max-Forwards: 70 [routes] Subject: Performance Test Content-Length: 0
ACK sip:[field1]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port];transport=[transport] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: sip:[field0]@[local_ip];tag=[call_number] To: sip:[field1]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port];tag=1 Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 1 ACK Contact: sip:[field0]@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport] Max-Forwards: 70 [routes] Subject: Performance Test Content-Length: 0
SIP/2.0 100 Trying [last_Via:] [last_From:] [last_To:] [last_Call-ID:] [last_CSeq:] Contact: <sip:[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]> Content-Length: 0
SIP/2.0 200 OK [last_Via:] [last_From:] [last_To:] [last_Call-ID:] [last_CSeq:] Session-Expires: 1201;refresher=uac Contact: <sip:[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]> Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len]
v=0 o=- 1485338250 2 IN IP4 192.168.25.2 s=- c=IN IP4 192.168.25.3 b=TIAS:64000 t=0 0 m=audio 6192 RTP/AVP 0 127 a=recvonly a=rtpmap:127 telephone-event/8000 a=ptime:20
SIP/2.0 100 Trying [last_Via:] [last_From:] [last_To:] [last_Call-ID:] [last_CSeq:] Contact: <sip:[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]> Content-Length: 0
SIP/2.0 200 OK [last_Via:] [last_From:] [last_To:] [last_Call-ID:] [last_CSeq:] Session-Expires: 1201;refresher=uac Contact: <sip:[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]> Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len]
v=0 o=- 1485338250 2 IN IP4 192.168.25.2 s=- c=IN IP4 192.168.25.3 b=TIAS:64000 t=0 0 m=audio 6192 RTP/AVP 0 127 a=sendrecv a=rtpmap:127 telephone-event/8000 a=ptime:20
-->
BYE sip:[field1]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port];transport=[transport] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: sip:[field0]@[local_ip];tag=[call_number] To: sip:[field1]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port][peer_tag_param] [last_Call-ID:] Contact: sip:[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport] CSeq: 4 BYE [routes] Max-Forwards: 70 Subject: Performance Test Content-Length: 0
